name: Temple Run
description: Third-person temple runner — key 1 = slide, key 2 = turn left, key 3 = turn right, key 4 = grab coins, key 5 = stumble, key 6 = power sprint; Space = jump, C = crouch

base.default: A lone explorer seen from behind — a young adventurer in a torn off-white shirt, brown trousers and boots, arms out for balance — on a narrow ancient stone temple path of mossy cracked flagstones, a single huge snarling demonic ape monster looming in the misty jungle ruins behind him. The world contains EXACTLY ONE explorer at the centre of the frame at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE demonic ape monster behind in the background at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE row of carved stone guardian statues lining the path ahead at a fixed position. Overgrown jungle-temple ruins draped in vines and moss, crumbling walls and carved idols, deep water far below on either side of the narrow bridge, a trail of glowing golden diamond coins floating down the centre of the path, shafts of green sunlight through the canopy. Temple Run video-game look, vivid saturated colours, third-person over-the-shoulder running-game framing, photorealistic. EXACTLY ONE explorer and EXACTLY ONE ape monster, no duplicate and no clone.

default.static: Third-person over-the-shoulder view from close behind the explorer, his back centred in frame at constant size, the temple path stretching ahead — never a first-person view. Neither the explorer nor the camera moves on its own; arrow-key look-input is the only source of camera motion, arcing around the stationary centred explorer while held.
default.dynamic: Strict third-person over-the-shoulder chase view from close behind and slightly above the explorer, his back and shoulders filling frame centre as the camera holds a fixed position behind him and tracks him forward down the temple path — never first-person. The camera does not rotate around him; look-input becomes the explorer changing heading, veering left and right along the path.

default.static: The explorer runs on the spot at the head of the temple path, boots pounding the mossy flagstones and arms pumping, poised to sprint, the demonic ape monster looming and snarling in the jungle behind him; the path ahead holds still until he moves.
default.dynamic: The explorer sprints flat-out forward down the ancient stone temple path, boots hammering the cracked flagstones and arms pumping, vaulting and dodging as the carved guardian statues, mossy walls and floating golden coins streak past on either side and the demonic ape monster smashes through the jungle behind, chasing.

events.name: Slide
events.detail: The explorer drops into a low baseball slide, skidding under a low stone archway across the flagstones with a scrape of boots, then springs back up onto his feet and keeps running. EXACTLY ONE explorer, a single lone runner, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Turn Left
events.detail: The explorer banks hard left at a junction in the temple path, throwing his weight into the corner and skidding around it, then straightens up and sprints on down the new stretch of path. EXACTLY ONE explorer, a single lone runner, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Turn Right
events.detail: The explorer banks hard right at a junction in the temple path, throwing his weight into the corner and skidding around it, then straightens up and sprints on down the new stretch of path. EXACTLY ONE explorer, a single lone runner, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Grab Coins
events.detail: The explorer runs straight through the floating trail of golden diamond coins, collecting them one by one only as he reaches each — every coin popping into a small burst of gold sparks the instant he touches it, while the rest keep floating and streaming steadily down the path ahead of him, still glinting along the flagstones. The coins do NOT all vanish at once and are not removed before he reaches them; the trail keeps flowing ahead as he scoops them up in sequence. EXACTLY ONE explorer, a single lone runner, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Stumble
events.detail: The explorer's boot catches on a broken flagstone and he pitches forward, arms wheeling as he stumbles and nearly falls, then catches his balance and recovers back into a full sprint. EXACTLY ONE explorer, a single lone runner, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Power Sprint
events.detail: The explorer pours on a burst of speed, boots blurring across the flagstones as the path streaks past faster and he pulls a little further ahead of the monster, then settles back to his running pace. EXACTLY ONE explorer, a single lone runner, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Demon Ape Charges
events.detail: The explorer stays the focus, unchanged in pose, while the single giant demonic ape monster behind him surges closer — smashing through the ruins and gaining on him, jaws gaping wide in a snarl, its huge clawed hands swiping as it looms larger and larger in the background, chasing. EXACTLY ONE ape monster, no second monster, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Bridge Collapses
events.detail: The ancient stone bridge begins to collapse — flagstones crumbling and falling away into the deep water far below just behind the explorer, the whole span buckling and breaking apart section by section as he races to stay ahead of the crumbling edge.

events.name: Fire Trap
events.detail: A row of flame jets erupts from the temple path ahead, spouts of orange fire blasting up between the flagstones directly in the explorer's way, flames flickering and billowing as he bears down on them.

events.name: Statue Awakens
events.detail: One of the carved stone guardian statues lining the path grinds and cracks to life, its stone head turning and a heavy stone arm swinging out across the path to block the way, dust crumbling from its joints as it moves. EXACTLY ONE statue awakens, a single one, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Coin Rush
events.detail: A dense glittering stream of golden diamond coins floods the path ahead, a long winding river of spinning gold coins hovering along the flagstones and around the corners, sparkling in the shafts of jungle light.

events.name: Rockslide
events.detail: A rockslide tumbles across the temple path ahead — a cascade of mossy boulders and rubble crashing down from the ruined walls and bouncing across the flagstones, kicking up dust as they roll into the explorer's path.

scene.jumpPrompt: The explorer springs upward off both feet, leaping high over a gap in the broken bridge, sailing through the air with his arms out before dropping back down and landing on the flagstones to keep running.
scene.crouchPrompt: The explorer drops into a low crouching slide close to the ground, ducking under an obstacle as the camera sinks low near the flagstones, and holds low.
scene.standPrompt: The explorer rises back up out of the slide to full running height as the camera lifts smoothly back to its normal over-the-shoulder vantage.
